description: Audit the current README.md for language that is unclear, overly verbose, or hard to understand
steps: Read through the entire README.md carefully
Identify sections where the language is complex, jargon-heavy, or ambiguous
Note any redundant or repetitive explanations
List specific sentences or paragraphs that need to be rewritten for clarity and conciseness

description: Rewrite the README.md project description using simple, concise, and easy-to-understand language
steps: Update the top-level project description (What is Ralph?) to use plain language that a new user can quickly understand
Simplify bullet points and explanations — remove redundant sentences
Ensure the 'Reverse Ralph' section is equally clear and concise
Keep the Quick Start section intact but review it for clarity
Preserve all existing headings, links, images, and code blocks — only update prose text

description: Verify the updated README.md is accurate, complete, and easy to understand
steps: Re-read the updated README.md from the perspective of a first-time user
Confirm no factual information about the project was removed or altered
Confirm the language is now simpler and more concise than the original
Commit the changes with an appropriate chore: commit message referencing SSCUI-81
